mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (user_id, post_id, liked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{likedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId}
